title: 389-ds-base bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.7.0-12]
- Resolves: RHEL-153553 - 389-ds-base-2.7.0-10.el9_7 updates dse.ldif with lowercase DNs causing ipa-healthcheck errors
full_text:
[2.7.0-12]
- Resolves: RHEL-153553 - 389-ds-base-2.7.0-10.el9_7 updates dse.ldif with lowercase DNs causing ipa-healthcheck errors
